## Design Taste
*Source: https://www.calebwu.ca/Metalab — generated by /taste*

### Tokens

**Typography** — SF Pro Display exclusively, 3 sizes only:
- Heading: 20.8px / weight 500 / line-height 29.12px
- Body: 17.6px / weight 400 / line-height 26.4px
- Label: 16px / weight 400 / line-height 22.4px / letter-spacing 0.12px

**Colors:**
- Page background: `#FFFFFF`
- Gutter background: `#F8F8F8` (flanking the content column)
- Text primary: `#171717`
- Text secondary: `#808080`
- Text tertiary: `#58534D` (warm-tinted gray)
- Accent: `#F54900` — used exactly once per page (breadcrumb dot only)

**Layout:**
- Content column: 735px max-width, centered in viewport
- Gutters: `#F8F8F8` flanking left and right
- No CSS grid; single-column vertical flow

**Radius:** `8px` / `12px` / `16px` (image containers) / `9999px` (pill elements)

**Shadows:** none

**Motion:**
- Layout/transform: `0.7s cubic-bezier(0.62, 0.61, 0.02, 1)`
- Color/state: `0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1)`

**Image ratios:** 16:9 (full-width feature), 10.3:1 (carousel), 1:1 (square split)

**Spacing base unit:** 8px

---

### Directives

- **When setting content width on wide viewports**, lock the column to ~735px and let `#F8F8F8` gutters fill the rest — because the gutters read as document margins, not empty space, and the narrow column forces vertical reading rather than left-right scanning.

- **When choosing type sizes**, compress everything into a ≤5px band (16–21px) with weight 400–500 only — because a flat scale forces readers to parse hierarchy through position, not size. The images carry emotional weight; the text is a guide.

- **When deploying an accent color**, use `#F54900` in exactly one location per page — because a color used in twelve places becomes ambient. One use per page makes it a spatial anchor (always means "home") rather than decoration.

- **When separating content sections**, use whitespace only (~80px vertical gaps) — no box-shadows, no horizontal rules, no border dividers — because shadows imply altitude, and this design keeps everything co-planar so hierarchy comes from reading order alone.

---

### Anti-patterns

- **Never** use box-shadows — not on image containers, not on cards, not on hover states. All surfaces are flat.
- **Never** use `#F54900` on more than one element per page. If it appears on a button AND a nav dot, it loses its landmark function.
- **Never** use font weights above 500. No bold (700), no black (900).
- **Never** exceed 3 distinct font sizes. The flat type scale is the system.
- **Never** stretch the content column past ~735px on wide viewports. The gutter space is intentional, not a missed opportunity.
- **Never** embed images inline beside text (float/wrap). Images are full-column-width chapters, placed as their own vertical block between text sections.
